payload.answer: There is a conflict between the existing memory “Sara is my daughter” and the new input “Sara is my niece.” I cannot choose which is correct. Safe actions available are: approve_supersession if the new statement should replace the existing one, keep_both if both statements should be retained as possibly referring to different contexts or different people named Sara, reject_new if the new statement should not be saved, or edit if you want to clarify the relationship or distinguish between people.

entity_resolution.reason: Both statements refer to Sara, but they assign different family relationships to the user. The backend has not established whether this is the same Sara or a different person with the same name.

details: Conflict detected between existing and new family relationship statements.
No durable memory change was committed.
Awaiting one of the allowed safe actions: approve_supersession, keep_both, reject_new, edit.
